summary: This is a brief link post directing readers to two Bloomberg View articles by Cathy O'Neil. The first article discusses the United Airlines passenger removal incident and what it reveals about societal conceptions of dignity. The second is a philosophical essay exploring hypothetical brain-computer interfaces for instant knowledge transfer. The post itself contains no substantive analysis, serving purely as a pointer to external content.
key_points: Links to Bloomberg View article analyzing the United Airlines dragging incident through a dignity lens
References a philosophical essay on hypothetical brain-uploading technology
Demonstrates O'Neil's range from current events criticism to speculative philosophy
money_quotes: United Airlines Exposes Our Twisted Idea of Dignity
key_insight: This link post offers no original analysis but signals O'Neil's interest in examining how corporate behavior and technology intersect with human dignity.
